calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2005 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Sep-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $636.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2005 Set For Trial On Dec-12-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
